tldr.title: Apple targets dozens of OpenAI employees with legal letters
tldr.author: merksittich
bullets: Apple's legal warnings to former engineers joining OpenAI highlight intensifying litigation over proprietary machine learning talent and trade secret retention.
The dispute signals aggressive IP protection of Siri, core LLMs, and on-device AI tech amidst heavy brain drain to competitor labs.
AI researchers transitioning between major firms face heightened risk from non-solicit covenants and stricter scrutiny over intellectual property transfer.

tldr.title: What are you doing this weekend?
tldr.author: caius
bullets: Feel free to tell what you plan on doing this weekend and even ask for help or feedback.
Please keep in mind itРђЎs more than OK to do nothing at all too!
What are you doing this weekend?

tldr.title: You can't bug fix your way out of the vulnpocalypse
tldr.author: freddyb
bullets: Patching legacy C/C++ is unsustainable; organizations must transition to memory-safe languages like Rust to eliminate entire classes of vulnerabilities permanently.
Security must shift from endless reactive patching to architectural isolation, sandboxing, and strict boundary enforcement to limit blast radiuses of exploits.
Adopt secure-by-design frameworks and automated SAST tools over manual CVE triage to proactively break the endless reactive patching cycle.

tldr.title: AWS: Inaccurate Estimated Billing Data РђЊ $1.7 billion
tldr.author: nprateem
bullets: URL already posted: https://health.aws.amazon.com/health/status I've got an estimated bill for $1.7 BILLION over this month.
Obvs have created an urgent AWS support ticket.

tldr.title: Short sellers notch $8.7B profit as SpaceX shares dip to IPO price
tldr.author: 1vuio0pswjnm7
bullets: Short sellers secured $8.7B in profits as SpaceX secondary market valuation experienced a steep decline toward baseline pricing.
The valuation correction reflects broader macroeconomic pressures and shifting investor sentiment toward high-value private aerospace and defense technology firms.
This decline impacts late-stage venture capital benchmarks, secondary market liquidity, and employee stock compensation structures across the tech industry.
